text:
Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will have a ‘00’ 
for any month that is after the death date. 

There is a late enrollment penalty for those who are eligible for Part D but choose not to enroll for any 
given year and do not have creditable coverage for that time. Several Medicare-eligible beneficiaries 
may have access to other types of prescription drug plans. Creditable prescription drug coverage
